rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MICHAEL COOMBS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 20, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANT HUMBERTO RUIZ, JR.'s HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION DENIED. Claimant's alleged tenancy is not at issue in this case. Order of August 20, 2014 specifically excludes any current tenant who is residing on the property. Any issues relating to claimant's tenancy are outside the scope of this action. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: TERANCE BAGBY et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY, A PUBLIC ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 20, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to November 20, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than October 27, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: TERANCE BAGBY et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY, A PUBLIC ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 20, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT Continued to November 20, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than October 27, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: 2882-2898 1/2 23RD STREET LLC VS. DIONIS OLIVARES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 20, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANTs REYNALDO AMAYA, ROSA AMAYA, LEILA SALAZAR, ARIEL LOPEZ, CRAIG CASTELLANT, CHARLENE DOBBS, JORGE NAVAS, ELENA MARTINEZ, DANIEL COSIO, ZHI CHEN, CARLOTA AMAYA, DIONIS OLIVARES, SANTOS FLORES, JUAN COSIO, MIGUEL COLON and REYNALDO AMAYA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges conversion, unjust enrichment, and constructive trust. Plaintiff has standing re: relocation payments made by plaintiff. Plaintiff may avail itself of common law remedies to recover statuary relocation payments. Whether relocation payments must be returned is an issue of fact not properly addressed on demurrer. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. DIANA LEMATUA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment And Recall Writ Of Execution
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 20, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT DIANA LEMATUA's Motion To Vacate Judgment And Recall Writ Of Execution Continued to October 28, 2014 per October 16, 2014 ex-parte order. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: FERGUS O'SULLIVAN VS. MICHAEL ROUPPET et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Continuance To Vacate The Default Judgement C.C.P. 1169
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 20, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT MICHAEL ROUPPET's Motion For Continuance To Vacate The Default Judgement C.C.P. 1169 DENIED. There is no Motion to Vacate on calendar in this case. It was ordered off calendar for untimeliness on August 18, 2014. Defendant may re-file his motion to vacate in compliance with the Code of Civil Procedure. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: CHIU CHAN VS. WENHAO FAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 20, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT XIUCHAN ZHAO's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Hearing Required. Defendant shall provide courtesy copy of the proof of service for this motion. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: BRIDGEWAY VISTA II L.P. VS. WILLIE L. BURCH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 20, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANTs ANNE JALOSJOS and SURI GADELKARIM's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer under CCP 1161a. Moving defendants' asserted tenancy and rights associated with such tenancy are factual issues outside the complaint and cannot be properly addressed on a demurrer. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: MILDRED SAUL HARRIS VS. CHANTIY WATERS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 20, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT CHANTIY WATERS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED. Paragraphs 13 and 17d are hereby stricken. Defendant is ordered to file an answer within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Plaintiff prepare order. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: MISSION BAY HOUSING PARTNERS, LP VS. STEPHANIE A PULVIRENTI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Set Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 20, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT STEPHANIE PULVIRENTI's Motion To Set Vacate Default And Judgment Hearing Required. Defendant shall provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than 9:00 a.m. on October 20, 2014. = (501/LOT)
